summary: 2 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 5 trades.

film.title: 13 Going on 30 Reboot
film.announcement: Jennifer Garner and Judy Greer are set to appear in Netflix's reboot of '13 Going on 30' in cameo roles.

tv.title: The Legend of Karna
tv.announcement: Sony LIV has acquired the animated series 'The Legend of Karna' from Graphic.
